title: Open Agentic CMO Telegram Delivery Artifact
description: Canonical schema for Pumba's Telegram delivery verification artifact.

type.description: Artifact type. Must always be telegram_delivery.

telegram_summary_sent.description: Whether the Telegram summary was successfully sent.

duplicate_delivery.description: Whether this delivery duplicated a previous valid Telegram summary.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when the Telegram delivery verification artifact was produced.

delivery_channel.description: Delivery channel used for the summary.

summary.description: Optional human-readable summary of the Telegram message that was sent.

summary_includes.description: Checklist confirming the Telegram summary included required workflow information.

parent_issue_id.description: Whether the summary includes the parent issue ID.

date_range.description: Whether the summary includes the date range.

total_content_items.description: Whether the summary includes total content item count.

number_of_posts.description: Whether the summary includes number of posts.

number_of_threads.description: Whether the summary includes number of threads.

platforms_used.description: Whether the summary includes platforms used.

languages_used.description: Whether the summary includes languages used.

notion_content_pipeline_status.description: Whether the summary includes Notion Content Pipeline status.

research_babe_status.description: Whether the summary includes Research Babe page status.

duplicate_check_result.description: Whether the summary includes duplicate check result.

blocked_or_skipped_items.description: Whether the summary includes blocked or skipped items when relevant.

metrics.description: Optional structured delivery counts included in the Telegram summary.

verification.description: Structured verification results for Telegram delivery.

delivery_sent.description: Whether the Telegram delivery was sent.

delivery_not_duplicated.description: Whether the Telegram delivery was not duplicated.

summary_content_verified.description: Whether the Telegram summary content was verified.

notion_status_referenced.description: Whether the summary references Notion Content Pipeline status.

research_babe_referenced.description: Whether the summary references Research Babe status.

examples.summary: PIG-101 completed for May 11–13, 2026. 3 content items persisted in Notion, including 2 posts and 1 thread. Research Babe page created and verified. No duplicates found.
